highlights.headline: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Mike Yastrzemski hit a game-sealing grand slam in the ninth inning, Matt Olson hit a first-inning home run while tying the franchise record for consecutive games played and the Atlanta Braves defeated the Pittsburgh Pirates 10-5 on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mike Yastrzemski hits grand slam in Braves' 10-5 win over Pirates

video.headline: Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Atlanta Braves vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

events.name: Kansas City Royals at New York Mets

highlights.headline: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tyrone Taylor, who entered when Mark Vientos suffered a fractured right hand after being hit by a pitch, hit the game-tying homer to start a five-run fifth inning Thursday, powering the New York Mets to a 7-3 win over the Kansas City Royals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mets use 5-run 5th inning to surge to 7-3 win over Royals

video.headline: Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Kansas City Royals vs. New York Mets: Game Highlights) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight
highlights.description: Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jeremiah Jackson hit a two-run double in the bottom of the eighth inning to lift the Baltimore Orioles to a 3-2 victory over the Chicago Cubs on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson's big hit in the 8th helps the Orioles avoid a sweep, 3-2 over the Cubs

video.headline: Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles: Game Highlight) 2026/07/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Gavin Williams pitched seven dominant innings, Gabriel Arias, Chase DeLauter and Patrick Bailey hit home runs and the Cleveland Guardians beat the Minnesota Twins 5-2 on Thursday to avoid a three-game sweep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gavin Williams throws seven strong innings, three Guardians homer in 5-2 victory over Twins

video.headline: Guardians avoid the sweep with 5-2 win over the Twins

headlines.description: — Caleb Durbin hit a two-run homer to help the surging Boston Red Sox top the Chicago White Sox 2-1 on Thursday for their sixth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durbin homers as the Red Sox beat the White Sox 2-1 for their 6th straight win
